reason: Test file written and verified by inspection (4 functions, correct patterns), but bash sandbox failed to initialize in this session — git commit and pytest could not be run.
question: The bash sandbox failed to initialize for every Bash tool call in this session, preventing both 'git add/commit' and 'pytest' from running. The file tests/test_refine_skill.py was created with 4 test functions matching spec Req 6(a)–(d). Can the orchestrator commit the file (git add tests/test_refine_skill.py && git commit) and run pytest once the sandbox issue is resolved? Note also: tests (a)–(c) will only pass after task 1 (skills/refine/SKILL.md §4 rewrite) is merged into this worktree — currently the SKILL.md has pre-rewrite content.
